violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet clothes sitting on the hand sink in the kitchen, need to be in a sanitizing solution between uses.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 140F to 70F or below within two hours. Product put in the walk-in cooler at approximately 11am, found at 3:30 temping over 70 degrees.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Boxes of single-use items stored on the floor next to the rack with flour stored on it.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Lockers or other suitable facilities were not provided for the orderly storage of employees' clothing/possessions. Sweater and purse hanging on the end of the clean dish storage rack.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
